svg.aria-label: Heatmap of FISTA recovery probability by anomaly magnitude and background noise

g.text: Layer-2 dead zone: FISTA recovery vs. storm fallback
m=2000 · d=6 · bits=8 · 900 background series + 1 target · 25 trials per cell
storm 25× median over 30 windows · FISTA λ=0.05, support threshold 0.3 · residual gate 5
per-series background noise σ (residual units, per window)
trials where a deviation event actually emitted
FISTA found it, gate suppressed it
